fields.name: dbId
fields.description: The unique identifier of the Project.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The timestamp when the Project was created.

fields.name: modifiedAt
fields.description: The timestamp when the Project was last modified.

fields.name: allowPosting
fields.description: Specifies whether posting is allowed for this project.

fields.name: ownerDbId
fields.description: The unique identifier of the project's owner.
